payload:
SCALE: micro only. Local machine only (Apple Silicon Mac). Use MLX for GPU work, numpy/scipy for math. Do NOT ssh to RunPod. Read PROMPT.md for how to pick work. Read 
  HYPOTHESES.yml, pick the lowest-priority open node with scale=micro and satisfied deps, run the full cycle, emit experiment.done. After integration, pick next eligible micro node. If none
   remain, generate 2-3 new micro hypotheses. The loop never ends.
exp_scale_500_experts: 3 scripts queued (prepare_scale_data, train_scale_adapters, eval_scale_500). Estimated ~ GPU cost. Next: await results.

Two parallel micro experiments complete. (1) exp_data_scaling_per_expert PROVEN: two-regime curve, N=500 cost-optimal (70% quality capture), saturation at N>=1000 (0.3% marginal). Both kills pass. (2) exp_relora_merge_cycle_scaling SUPPORTED: K=200 cos_ratio=4.58 (<5.0 threshold), loss_ratio=1.167 (<1.50 threshold). Loss degradation entirely from base quality (optimizer resets), NOT composition geometry. Composition penalty stable ~1-2% across all K. Production ReLoRA safe for SOLE.

3 new macro hypotheses generated and submitted to GPU queue: exp_sole_vs_full_finetune (run_sole_vs_finetune_1773531197), exp_expert_continual_addition (run_continual_addition_1773531208), exp_sole_inference_throughput (run_inference_throughput_1773531219). All deps satisfied via exp_distillation_pilot_50 (supported). Next iteration: check GPU queue results, integrate completed experiments.
Activated 3 new macro hypotheses in HYPOTHESES.yml (open→active). All eligible macro nodes are queued. GPU worker processing 28 pending tasks. No new scripts needed this iteration.
Fixed GPU queue: killed stuck eval (17hrs), removed 5 stale entries, reordered (retrain_all_adapters first), re-added train_reasoning_expert, synced scripts. 20 tasks pending.

Two parallel P4 micro experiments complete. (1) exp_lora_flow_comparison PROVEN: SOLE vs LoRA-Flow/X-LoRA/CAT — all methods identical under orthogonality, LoRA-Flow gate scales O(k*d*L) infeasible at k>=100, SOLE positioning confirmed. (2) exp_layerwise_order_sensitivity KILLED (K2): attn/FFN slope ratio=1.01x (identical scaling ~62*cos). Order sensitivity is cosine-determined, not layer-type-determined. Layer-wise composition strategies NOT motivated.

Fixed held-out HumanEval eval: generation timeout, checkpointing, non-fatal pipeline. Resubmitted as run_humaneval_only_1773533006. Teacher comparison scripts missing from main (task-1773533017-a1d9).

Integrated 2 experiments: exp_lora_flow_comparison (supported — SOLE positioning confirmed, quality vacuous at micro, LoRA-Flow infeasible at k>=100), exp_layerwise_order_sensitivity (killed K2 — attn/FFN slope ratio 1.01x, identical scaling). Both adversarial reviews PROCEED. Generated 2 new micro hypotheses: composition_weight_sensitivity (dilution test), order_sensitivity_cosine_threshold (safety threshold). consecutive_kills reset to 0.
Fixed SFTConfig max_seq_length bug in 7 scripts, committed 11a1c06, resubmitted reasoning expert training. All macro experiments queued.

Generated 3 new macro hypotheses (ffn_only_macro_composition P3, ppl_guided_expert_refinement P4, dynamic_weight_composition_macro P3). Wrote and submitted exp_ffn_only_macro_composition to GPU queue (run_ffn_only_macro_1773534359). Worker is active with 22 pending tasks.
Resubmitted failed LTE no_reset experiment (run_lte_no_reset_1773534654). Queue healthy: 1 active + 23 pending. All 5 open macro nodes blocked by active deps. No new work to submit.
fixed LTE no-reset prepare_domain_data mkdir bug (ffe9861), resubmitted task will auto-sync. 18 active macro, 23 pending GPU tasks, 0 new work to queue.
Integrated MMLU held-out eval results: kill criteria met (avg -3.67pp), evidence recorded in HYPOTHESES.yml. Status kept active pending retrained adapter re-eval + HumanEval.

exp_composition_weight_sensitivity: SUPPORTED. Zero quality degradation N=2-100 (AVG gap 2-6e-6%). SNR increases with N via O(1/N) signal vs O(1/N^2) noise. K2 passes decisively. K1 inconclusive (micro vacuous regime). Orthogonality confirmed at N=100 (cos=0.0021, 167x below bound). Macro validation needed for K1.

exp_composition_weight_sensitivity: 6 fixes: (1) SNR~O(N) is prediction not finding, +0.57 contradicts -1.0 prediction, (2) increase noise samples 3->20, (3) fix signal/noise asymmetry in LOO vs replacement, (4) qualify ortho measurement scope (20 of 100 experts), (5) downgrade status to supported-K2-only, (6) add trivial-K2 caveat to FINDINGS.md

Generated 3 new macro hypotheses (small_n_eval p2, redundancy_clustering p3, interpolation_linearity p4). All submitted to GPU queue. Queue now has 26 pending + 1 active (retrain_all_adapters). Committed 515c6a0.
Fixed retrain_all_adapters timeout (30min→3hr). Resubmitted as retrain_all_adapters_1773536208. Committed 6f891ed.

2 new diagnostic hypotheses for MMLU regression: individual_expert_held_out (run_individual_eval_1773536662), selective_composition_mmlu (run_selective_composition_1773536672). Queue: 28 pending + 1 active.
All 5 eligible macro nodes queued + retrain. 28 pending tasks. Active: train_reasoning_expert. No results to integrate yet. Next iteration: check for completed results.
Activated 5 submitted experiments in HYPOTHESES.yml (open→active). Queue: 1 active + 28 pending. All eligible macro nodes submitted. Waiting for GPU results.

exp_composition_weight_sensitivity REVISE complete: 6 fixes applied (SNR relabeled as prediction, noise 3->20 samples, signal/noise symmetry fixed, ortho scope qualified, status downgraded to supported-K2-only, trivial-K2 caveat added). New SNR at N=20/50/100: 2.2/13.6/16.0. Power law +0.569 still contradicts -1.0 prediction.
queue_monitoring: 1 active (train_reasoning_expert), 28 pending. All fixes applied. No new results to integrate. Waiting for GPU queue to process.
No new GPU results. Active: train_reasoning_expert_1773532315. Pending: 28 tasks. All eligible macro nodes queued. Waiting for queue to process.

exp_composition_weight_sensitivity: adversarial review v2 PROCEED. Status: supported (K2 only). Pre-merge dilution stable to N=100 (trivially). Two non-blocking fixes: noise norm double-division bug, MATH.md vs PAPER.md noise scaling contradiction. No new hypothesis nodes generated (findings are incremental).

Queue audit complete. 28 pending + 1 active GPU tasks. All 22 scripts audited clean (no max_seq_length, mkdir, or timeout bugs). No new results to integrate. No unblocked macro nodes. Waiting for GPU queue to process.

Generated 2 new diagnostic macro hypotheses (logit_ensemble_vs_merge, top_k_embedding_routing) targeting -3.67pp MMLU regression. Both submitted to GPU queue (30 pending). All open macro nodes remain blocked on active experiments.

exp_cross_domain_dilution_vs_k: PROVEN. PPL-probe weighting (10 examples) achieves r=0.990 with oracle, +9.34pp improvement over equal-weight, worst-case dilution resolved (arith_reverse +24.3% to -8.5%). Weight-space signals (activation, logit-diff) useless at d=32. Top-1 oracle fails on tasks needing both experts. Smooth PPL-weighting is the clear winner.
exp_cross_domain_dilution_vs_k: PROVEN. Adversarial review PROCEED. PPL-probe weighting resolves dilution. 2 new micro hypotheses: tau sensitivity, K>2 scaling.

Fixed PeftModel base model corruption bug in 5 macro eval scripts (small_n, logit_ensemble, top_k_routing, individual_eval, selective_composition). Synced to RunPod. Queue: 30 pending, 1 active. No new results yet.
queue saturated (30 pending, 1 active), no new completions, all open macro nodes blocked by active experiments, waiting for GPU results
Fixed 3 broken dep refs in HYPOTHESES.yml. Queue saturated (30 pending), no new results. Monitoring continues.

exp_adaptive_rank_selection: PROVEN. energy_rank_95 predicts optimal LoRA rank within 2x for 93-95% of domains at d>=128 (Spearman rho=0.73). Heuristic: r_prod = snap(r_95 * 1.5). Simulated only -- needs real training validation.
Queue unchanged: 30 pending, 1 active (train_reasoning_expert). No new completions. All open macro nodes blocked. Waiting for GPU tasks to complete.

exp_adaptive_rank_selection: 4 fixes required. 1) Fix knee detector (curvature bias on non-uniform grid gives knee=48 for exact_rank=8 at d=64). Use Kneedle, uniform grid, or fixed threshold. 2) Add null baseline (always-predict-rank-16 gets ~67% within 2x, raise K2 threshold). 3) Test SNR=5 and SNR=100 in addition to SNR=20. 4) Compute correlations on per-domain medians (15 points) not pooled 75 seed-domain pairs.
Queue saturated (30 pending, 0 new completions). No productive macro work. Waiting for GPU tasks to complete.
Queue saturated (30 pending, 0 new completions). All 5 open macro nodes blocked by active experiments. No productive macro work available.
Queue unchanged: 30 pending, 0 completions. All 5 open macro nodes blocked by active experiments. Waiting for GPU queue to process.

exp_adaptive_rank_selection v2 REVISED: All 4 adversarial fixes applied (Kneedle knee detector, null baseline, multi-SNR 5/20/100, per-domain medians). Results: Spearman rho 0.942-0.987 (K1 PASS), 80-100% within 2x beating null by 13-47pp (K2 PASS) across all 9 conditions (3 dims x 3 SNRs). Best metric: energy_rank_99.
Queue unchanged: 30 pending, 0 completions. All macro nodes blocked. Waiting for GPU results.
Queue saturated (30 pending), same active task (train_reasoning_expert), no new completions. All open macro nodes blocked by active experiments. Waiting for GPU queue to process.
Queue saturated (30 pending), all open macro nodes blocked by active experiments. No new completions. Waiting for GPU queue to process.

exp_adaptive_rank_selection v2 PROCEED. Integrated: HYPOTHESES.yml (evidence+2 new nodes), FINDINGS.md (v2 update), VISION.md (proven table + 2 open questions). New hypotheses: exp_adaptive_rank_snr_fallback (p4), exp_mixed_rank_grassmannian_capacity (p5).
Queue unchanged: 30 pending, train_reasoning_expert still active, all open macro nodes blocked by active experiments. No productive work available.
Queue saturated (30 pending), train_reasoning_expert still active, all open macro nodes blocked. No productive work available.
Queue saturated (30 pending, 0 new completions). All 5 open macro nodes blocked by active experiments. No productive work available — waiting for GPU queue to process.

exp_adaptive_rank_snr_fallback PROVEN. Compound heuristic (r_99 default, r_95 fallback when ratio > 2.0) achieves 95% within-2x across 12 conditions. +23.3pp over r_99 at low SNR, zero regression at high SNR. Both K1 and K2 passed.
Queue unchanged: active=train_reasoning_expert, pending=30, no new completions. All macro nodes blocked. Waiting for GPU queue to process.
queue saturated (30 pending), all open macro nodes blocked by active experiments, no new results to integrate

exp_adaptive_rank_snr_fallback PROCEED. Added adversarial review evidence. Generated 2 new hypotheses: exp_snr_transition_zone_validation (p6), exp_real_lora_snr_measurement (p5). Updated VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, HYPOTHESES.yml.
Queue saturated (30 pending), all open macro nodes blocked by active experiments. No new completions. Waiting for GPU queue to process.
Queue unchanged: 30 pending, train_reasoning_expert active 1h47m. All open macro nodes blocked. No productive work available.
queue unchanged: 30 pending, train_reasoning_expert still active (~2h+), all open macro nodes blocked, no productive work available
Queue unchanged: train_reasoning_expert still active (~3h), 30 pending, no new results. All open macro nodes blocked. No productive work available.
Queue unchanged: 30 pending, train_reasoning_expert still active, no new completions. All open macro nodes blocked. Waiting for GPU queue to process.

exp_correction_signal_quality: SUPPORTED. Teacher error 19.6% avg (K1 survives) but 3/6 hard domains exceed 20%. Execution degeneracy kills K2 for systems_programming (11.3%). Decision tree: execution for well-tested code, teacher for non-code, human for hard/critical. Blocks exp_execution_based_self_learning.
Queue unchanged: train_reasoning_expert still active, 30 pending, no new completions. All open macro nodes blocked. No productive work.

exp_correction_signal_quality: PROCEED. Teacher error 19.6% (K1 survives), execution degeneracy kills systems_programming (K2). Decision tree for Evolve. 2 new hypotheses: correction_routing_sensitivity (micro), teacher_correction_empirical_validation (macro).
submitted exp_teacher_correction_empirical_validation (run_teacher_correction_empirical_1773543086). Queue: 31 pending. All other open macro nodes blocked.
Queue unchanged: 31 pending, train_reasoning_expert still active, all open macro nodes blocked by active experiments. No productive work available.

Queue processing: run_clone_compete active, 30 pending, no new macro results. Waiting.

exp_synthetic_vs_real_data: SUPPORTED. K1 killed (synthetic-only 58% worse than real, threshold 15%). K2 survives (mixed 80/20 real/synthetic +11.2% over pure real). Orthogonality unaffected by data source (|cos|~0.10 all regimes). Contamination risk 5x higher for synthetic. Recommendation: 80/20 real/synthetic mix.
Queue advancing: train_reasoning_expert OK (micro), run_clone_compete now active (macro). 30 pending. All open macro nodes still blocked. No new work to submit.

exp_synthetic_vs_real_data: supported. Adversarial review PROCEED (4 non-blocking). Frechet merge VISION.md reference fixed. 2 new micro hypotheses: coverage_vs_noise_disentangle, mixing_ratio_significance.
